reviews.review_description: i bought it because it was the only free one i could find and it was fun for a while that being a couple minutes and i mean its a semi-alright game but its just not that fun and i love pickleball but this game is just not it i cant even win one match matter how hard i try too but in the end i guess its an ok game
This game was the only free one I could find and it is HORRIBLE like I hit the ball and apparently I didn’t! Like WHATis is so bad it’s not even funny if I could rate it zero stars I totally would!

The game is very fun, the pickleball physics are amazing, and as a pro pickleball player it almost feels like I’m playing pickle ball in real life, only one small problem and that is that there is some kind of aim assist on any solo mode that automatically sends the ball to the bot making it impossible to score, even without scoring and losing every game I’m having the time of my life playing this and I can’t wait for multiplayer so I can play with my friends!

reviews.review_title: It’s good,but could use some more stuff.
reviews.review_description: It’s Realy fun, it’s probably impossible to beat the bot. Could use some better mechanics. But I cannot wait for multiplayer practice and more. It will be much more fun I think. ￼
